name: create_qor_check
full_help:
create_qor_check

Description: 
Add a new RQS suggestion

Syntax: 
create_qor_check  -name <arg> [-type <arg>] -rule_body <arg>
                  -property_values <args> [-opt_switches <arg>] [-quiet]
                  [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  -name             Suggestion ID of user suggestion to create
  [-type]           Type of QoR check to create. Should be either 
                    "suggestion" or "assessment"
                    Default: suggestion
  -rule_body        List of names of TCL procs to execute as part of 
                    suggestion. First proc must return true or false. Second 
                    proc is executed to actually create COMMAND property of 
                    suggestion instance
  -property_values  Properties of new check specified as list of key value 
                    pairs
  [-opt_switches]   Switches to pass to opt_design which may be invoked as 
                    part of suggestion application
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, Feasibility, Timing
